creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The particular spammer is: Mimansa Sharma <mimansa.s@saxonglobal.com>

Subject: Onsite Role as Embedded Engineer in CA

e-mail body:

Greetings from Saxon Global

This is Mimansa Sharma from Saxon Global. Saxon Global is one of the fastest growing Inc 500 Companies in the US, providing enhanced IT consulting to top Notch Direct IT Clients, kindly share a copy of your resume, else please take a moment to forward this Job details to someone you think, might be interested and good fit for the job.
...skipped...
